title: 'Excellent' and 'exceptionally flexible': Geekom IT13 mini PC for small business users running office applications and video conferencing tools gets a welcome 10% price cut
summary: Powered by an Intel Core i5-13600H processor, the Geekom IT13 includes 16GB RAM, a 1TB PCIe Gen4 SSD, dual USB4 ports, WiFi 6E, 2.5Gb Ethernet, Windows 11 Pro, and quad-display support.
